subject: A fully-armored knight in dark plate mail with a red cape seated at a desk, closely examining documents; quill, inkwell, and scattered papers surround them in an ornate indoor chamber
description: A humanoid figure in full dark plate armor — visor closed, no face visible — sits at or leans over a desk holding a rolled or folded document with gauntleted hands. A flowing red cape drapes behind them. On the desk and floor around them are scattered papers, letters, and documents. A quill sits in an inkwell at lower left. The room is ornate: moulded architectural details, a window or aperture with soft light behind, and shelving or cabinets visible. A rose medallion or brooch is visible at the clasp of the cape. The mood is investigative and conspiratorial — this figure is reading and evaluating intelligence. The flavor text references Queen Marchesa, identifying this as one of her agents, though the depicted figure is the sentry, not the queen herself.
foreground: Armored knight in dark plate mail with red cape reading documents at a desk covered in scattered papers
background: Ornate indoor chamber with moulded architectural details, soft window light, shelving
emotion: focused scrutiny; the armored figure's posture is attentive and deliberate, bent over the document
